title: Myrkr strike team
content:

The '''Myrkr strike team''' was a group of young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led by [[Padawan/Legends|Apprentice]] [[Anakin Solo]], with the support of two [[YVH 1|YVH droids]] and various personnel, who went to infiltrate the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] ''[[Baanu Rass]]'' in [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr's]] orbit in order to destroy the [[voxyn]] queen during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. The operation was known as the [[Mission to Myrkr]].

==Result==
The mission was a success with [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] destroying the voxyn queen, but it came at a huge price: six Jedi - almost half of the task force - were killed, including [[Commander/Legends|strike team commander]] Anakin Solo. Jacen Solo was taken prisoner by [[Vergere]] after killing the queen. The [[Tachyon Flier|craft]] [[Raynar Thul]] stayed on was hijacked by [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Lomi Plo]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Welk]], and all three were presumed lost during Myrkr outbound. [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and the remaining eight members of the strike team hijacked [[Nom Anor]]'s craft [[Trickster|''Ksstarr'']] and survived Myrkr outbound.

==Legacy==
[[35 ABY/Legends|Eight years later]], the survivors of the strike team all received a desperate call through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], emanating from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. The Jedi journeyed to the Unknown Regions, and fell under the influence of the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]]. [[Alema Rar]] turned against her fellow Jedi, and all except Jacen (and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], who refused to leave [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] due to her duty as [[Queen Mother]]) became [[Joiner]]s, their minds open to manipulation by Raynar Thul—now known as UnuThul—Welk and Lomi Plo, who survived the Myrkr outbound and crash-landed elsewhere. The influence marked the beginning of the [[Dark Nest Crisis]] which eventually led to the [[Swarm War]]. Five years after the war, Jacen Solo turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and was taught the ways of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. He would later [[Flow-walking|flow-walk]] with [[Tahiri Veila|Tahiri]] back to the mission where she passionately kissed Anakin Solo before he was killed. As a result, Tahiri joined Jacen in his attempt to bring peace to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. By then the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Caedus]], Jacen was eventually killed by his sister Jaina in [[41 ABY]].

==Statistics==
Before leaving the [[Eclipse Station]], tacticians projected that the successful rate of the mission would be 72%, which would decrease by 2% per standard hour. Once Anakin Solo applied Plan D during Myrkr inbound, the success rate decreased to 21% with a casualty projection of over 90%. [[Ulaha Kore]] stayed behind aboard the ''[[Exquisite Death]]'' to boost the successful rate to around 50%, which decreased by 0.2% per standard minute. As the strike team carried the mission for over at least thirty standard hours, one can state that the strike team achieved the impossible against all odds.

Taking Jedi and droids into calculation, 40% of the original strike team participants were killed in action, 45% survived the mission and the outbound, 10% were missing in action, and 5% were captured by the enemy. 10% of the original strike team survivors were later killed in the Yuuzhan Vong War. Around 78% of the strike team survivors in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]] became Joiners or partial Joiners.

Out of members that made up the main part of the original strike team (excluding the Calrissians and Yarsroot), only eight—Jaina Solo, Lowbacca, Tesar Sebatyne, Tahiri Veila, Raynar Thul, Tekli, Zekk, and Tenel Ka Djo—survived both the mission itself and its long-lasting repercussions.
[[File:YoungJediKnight_TERC.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Some members of the Strike Team during their time at the Jedi Praxeum on Yavin IV]]

==Field operatives==
Given the title of [[Commander/Legends|Strike team commander]], [[Anakin Solo]] was tasked with the [[Vongsense|detection]] of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] on the mission. He would later die in action, allowing the remaining Jedi to flee slaughter. Second-in-command, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] was named [[Force-meld|Meld coordinator]]; the individual that would keep spirits high on the mission. He was also the animal expert out of the group, an ability that would come in use when dealing with the bioforms of the Vong technology. Jacen would be captured by [[Vergere]] and tortured while the surviving task force members fled ''[[Baanu Rass]]''. [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] was third-in-command, and the pilot for the group. Her task was to located and operate the hijacked [[Trickster|''Ksstarr'']] out of the worldship. [[Ganner Rhysode]] served as the decoy commander on the assignment; used to draw fire away from Anakin Solo.

Jedi [[Zekk]] served as the equipment scavenger; picking up as many weapons as he could to assist in the operation. [[Tahiri Veila]] used her abilities to understand the Vongese as the group's [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|translator]]. [[Lowbacca]] and his droid [[M-TD|Em Teedee]] were the biomechanics experts, while [[Tekli]] served as the groups field medic. [[Tesar Sebatyne]] and [[Alema Rar]] were meant to be used as stealth and underground infiltration agents, but both were forced into action with the rest of the team.

[[File:SwordHeroTraitor-SWG5.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Jaina, Anakin and Jacen Solo battling voxyn]]
[[Ulaha Kore]] would lend her piloting and tactical analyst skills before being killed in action; [[Eryl Besa]] would contribute her powers of space navigation before being killed in the worldship. [[Bela Hara|Bela]] and [[Krasov Hara]] provided their stealth skills before meeting their death, along with team sniper, [[Jovan Drark]].

Dark Jedi [[Lomi Plo]] and [[Welk]] were discovered by [[Raynar Thul]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo]]; who were providing ground support for the team. The Dark Jedi hijacked the ''[[Tachyon Flier]]'', the groups escape transport, along with Raynar. They were eventually rediscovered in a [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] hive during the Dark Nest Crisis.

In addition to the Jedi, the [[YVH-Series battle droid]] droids [[YVH 2-1S]] and [[YVH 2-4S]] provided cover fire, before being felled by Yuuzhan Vong.

===Supportive personnel and strategists===
Under the alias of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Fitzgibbon Lane]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and his wife [[Tendra Risant Calrissian|Tendra]] piloted [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] and delivered the field operatives to the Yuuzhan Vong on ''[[Exquisite Death]]''.
The chef, [[Yarsroot]] and droid [[YVH 1-1A]] helped to create the illusion that Lane was delivering the Jedi to the Vong for payment.

From [[Eclipse Station]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the other Jedi present provided strategy; along with the hopes and prayers from [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]].
